regional_cost_note: Lighting specialists in Auckland typically charge $2,600–$6,500 for a full-house LED upgrade (supply and install), $420–$1,900/circuit for outdoor lighting, and $155–$265/hr for commercial lighting design. Auckland rates are the highest in NZ, reflecting the city's cost of living and high demand. All electrical work must be done by a registered electrician — lighting specialists who aren't electricians can only advise, not install.
